case_title: UNION PLAZA DIAGNOSTIC SERVICES VS AKHVARI SIMIN

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $364.50 FILED BY UNION PLAZA DIAGNOSTIC SERVICES AS TO DEFENDANT AKHVARI SIMIN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-11-1991 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 02
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT AKHVARI SIMIN

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF UNION PLAZA DIAGNOSTIC SERVICES IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT AKHVARI SIMIN PLTF FAILED TO PROVIDE PROOF THAT DEFT SIGNED FOR SERVICES TO BE RENDERED STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
